Notice Of Motion And Motion To Vacate Default Judgment And Set Aside Default
Off Calendar Mar-21-2017 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: Appearances:
Andrew Westley, Esq. (415-362-2817) for Plaintiff/opposing party Grace Bigler.
Ryan Greenspan, Esq. (925-939-5330) of McNamara, Ney, Beatty, Slattery, Borges & Ambacher LLP for Defendant/Moving party SHUIMU HUANG and QING YE.

ARGUED. Plaintiff contests the tentative ruling. Plaintiff argues whether Mr. Blumenfeld's communication with Defendant is privileged, argues fees and costs . Defendant submits to the tentative ruling. Defendant responds re lack of actual notice. The Court having reviewed the pleadings and having heard oral argument rules as follows:

DEFENDANT SHUIMU HUANG and QING YE's Motion To Vacate Default Judgment And Set Aside Default
is taken under submission. Both sides to submit proposed orders. Defendant to submit a proposed order that tracks the tentative ruling within three days with an amount that parties have stipulated to. Parties to meet and confer on the amount. Plaintiff to submit a proposed order setting forth denying the motion. Plaitniff submits a proposed order in Open Court. Judge: Andrew Y. S. Cheng, Clerk: M. Goodman, Not Reported. (D501)
